settings.title: System Settings
settings.theme_desc: Toggle between Light and Dark mode
settings.win11_warning: * Manual customization is only supported on Windows 11. The system is automatically syncing colors according to your Windows.
settings.close_behavior_desc: When clicking the X button in the top right corner
settings.update_app_list_desc: Reload application data after expanding access permissions
settings.clear_cache_desc: Free up temporary data (Will start slower next time)
settings.uninstall_desc: Delete all applications and related data
settings.developed_by: Application developed by Hieu GL Lite with the Gemini chatbot
settings.based_on: Based on .NET 8, Vue.js and Vuetify 3. Optimizing the application experience at its best.

messages.error_unknown_kill: Error: Cannot identify the application to close!

otp_modal.title: Security Verification
otp_modal.otp_sent_to: A 6-digit OTP code has been sent to your email:

update_modal.title: SOFTWARE UPDATE
update_modal.update_prompt: For the best experience, please update the application.

warning_modal.title: Invalid Environment!
warning_modal.message: The system detected that you are running the application in a different environment. Please install the application for the best experience.
warning_modal.btn_ignore: I AM A DEV, IGNORE WARNING

welcome_modal.title: WELCOME TO PUBLIC BETA
welcome_modal.message:
Thank you for participating in the Hieu GL Lite Public Beta!

During this phase, the application is being optimized and may still have some minor bugs. Your contributions will help us improve the product.

maintenance_modal.title: System Maintenance
maintenance_modal.message_1: The server is currently paused for system upgrades and performance improvements.
maintenance_modal.message_2: We are working hard to bring everything back online as soon as possible. Please come back later!

manifest.changelog_current:
Version 26.4.3 is required to use!

- Added a right-click menu when clicking on the emulator in the sidebar.
- Upgraded UI with a new Progress Bar, enhancing user experience.
- In addition to checking storage for the installation location, it will also check the C:\ drive to avoid out-of-space errors during installation (Minimum 5GB for C:\ drive).
- Logging out of your account will now require confirmation.
- Fixed application sync issues after installation/uninstallation.
- Fixed inconsistent language sync issues (Navigation page will use the browser's language).
- Fixed application sync issues after installation/uninstallation.
- Fixed inconsistent language sync issues (Navigation page will use the browser's language).
